review_order.purpose: Verify all quantitative claims and table scopes.
Check overclaim risks and blocked claims.

must_do_before_submission: Replace citation placeholders with verified references.
Create Figure 1 schematic and optionally Figure 2 metric chart.
Format tables for target journal template.
Perform human claim audit after citation/figure edits.
Decide target journal and adjust length/style.
optional_before_submission: Select traceable qualitative examples for Figure 3.
Run full locked public-raster inference if compute/environment is stable and if it can be audited before submission.
Add human-reviewed real-raster annotations if available.
safe_core_message: Audit-gated MoE floorplan parsing with bounded component evidence, explicit policy handoff, and transparent negative results.
supervisor_summary: A bounded manuscript draft package is ready: main draft, metric tables, methods/results/discussion sources, citation/figure plan, and claim scan. It is appropriate for internal review and polishing, but not final submission until citations, figures, formatting, and human claim audit are completed.
